mapper.sql: id, name, short_name, logo, description, type, gender, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team (name, short_name, logo, description, type, gender, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{shortName}, #{logo}, #{description}, #{type}, #{gender}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName, team_short_name AS teamShortName, team_logo AS teamLogo, team_description AS teamDescription, gender, gender_name AS genderName, college_full_name AS collegeFullName, college_short_name AS collegeShortName, team_rank AS teamRank, rank_name AS rankName, sport_type AS sportType, sport_type_name AS sportTypeName, member_count AS memberCount, captain_count AS captainCount, player_count AS playerCount, coach_count AS coachCount, leader_count AS leaderCount, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM v_team_info ORDER BY team_id
SELECT FROM team WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY name
